name: Friendly T-Rex
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a friendly cartoon Tyrannosaurus Rex standing on two strong legs, a big head with a wide toothy grin, tiny front arms, a long balancing tail, and rows of small triangular teeth, looking cheerful not scary

name: Smiling Triceratops
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a chubby smiling Triceratops standing in profile, three horns on its face, a large bony neck frill with scalloped edges, a round body with four sturdy legs and a short tail, friendly eyes

name: Stegosaurus in the Sun
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a happy Stegosaurus walking across grass, a double row of large diamond-shaped plates along its arched back, a small head low to the ground, a thick tail with four spikes, a round sun and a few clouds above

name: Long-Neck Brachiosaurus
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a gentle long-necked Brachiosaurus reaching its head up to nibble leaves from the top of a tall leafy tree, a huge rounded body, four pillar-like legs, and a long tapering tail

name: Baby Dino Hatching
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a cute baby dinosaur hatching out of a cracked egg, big sparkly eyes peeking over the broken shell, tiny arms reaching up, little bumps along its head, two more spotted dinosaur eggs resting in a nest beside it

name: Spinosaurus by the River
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a Spinosaurus standing beside a river, a tall sail of connected spines along its back, a long narrow crocodile-like snout, strong clawed hands, water ripples and a couple of reeds at its feet

name: Velociraptor on the Run
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a sleek Velociraptor mid-stride as if running, body leaning forward, a long stiff tail held straight out for balance, a curved claw on each foot, an open mouth with small sharp teeth, alert eyes

name: Pteranodon Flying
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a Pteranodon gliding through the sky with wide outstretched leathery wings, a long pointed crest at the back of its head, a sharp beak, small clouds around it and a hint of mountains far below

name: Ankylosaurus with Club Tail
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a sturdy armored Ankylosaurus standing low to the ground, its back covered in rows of bony plates and small spikes, short legs, a wide friendly face, and a thick tail ending in a heavy round club

name: Dino Mom and Baby
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a tall long-necked mother dinosaur lowering her head to gently touch noses with her small baby dinosaur, both standing in a grassy clearing with a few ferns, warm and loving expressions

name: Dino and the Volcano
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a cute round cartoon dinosaur standing on a small hill, looking back over its shoulder at a smoking volcano in the distance, scattered ferns and a few rocks in the foreground, a couple of palm-like prehistoric plants

name: Diplodocus Eating Leaves
subject: animals/dinosaur
prompt: a long low Diplodocus stretching its very long neck forward to munch a leafy bush, an extremely long whip-like tail trailing behind, four thick legs, a small head and a calm smile
